name: Velvet Ruffle Heart Kids' Novelty Plush Pillow Pink - Pillowfort™
description: Bring a cute update to your kid's room with the Velvet Ruffle Heart Novelty Plush Pillow from Pillowfort™. This novelty plush pillow is shaped like a heart in peach adorned with a ruffle for cute vibes. Boasting a polyester plush exterior with polyester filling to offer a cuddly feel, display this velvet heart pillow solo or arrange it on their bed or chair with other novelty pillows.
